cards.back: A document that outlines the core values and principles of Agile project management
A structured approach to project management that emphasizes teamwork, accountability, and iterative progress toward well-defined goals
A visual system for managing work, emphasizing continuous flow and limiting work in progress to improve efficiency and productivity
A period of time (usually 1-4 weeks) during which a team works on a specific set of tasks and deliverables in a Scrum framework
A daily meeting in a Scrum framework where team members share their progress, plans, and any obstacles they are facing
